title: LEGEND SANDY Squeaky Dog Toys, Plush Toy for Small Dogs, 5 Pieces Stuffed Animal Puppy Toy with Tug of War Value Bundle, Puppy Chew Toy for Teething
features: Pack of 5 tough dog toys including hedgehog, squirrel, scorpion, elephant and dog. Stuffed dog toys are made of high quality cotton and soft fabric with thickened lining. This chew toy is safe, but also durable to withstand heavy toys. Great as a puppy toy, which is gentle on gums and teeth. Get five high-quality dog toys for small and medium aggressive chewers in one bundle

Every small dog toy has a squeaker in their body, squeaks when dogs chew can keep them busy. Crinkle Paper is placed in the ears and tails of toys. The vibrant colors and cute shapes are the dog's favorites, which can arouse the puppy's desire to attack, relieve the depression, boredom and anxiety when alone, adding daily entertainment to your pets

Our cuddly toy comes with 4 knotted rope legs, which are woven from cotton, making the toy more durable and bite resistant. The extra floppy body is easy to grab, ideal for multiple dog pulling, throwing and fetching. Prefect Dog Pull Toy for Chihuahuas, Corgis, Pomeranian, Poodles and their owner to communicate and build relationship

Our dog toy is packed in a delicate and beautiful cardboard box, suitable for giving as a gift. Great for newborn puppy as first set toy for dogs, birthday toys for dogs, Halloween, Christmas, Thanksgiving etc

30 days after-sale service with our dog toys. However, we do not recommend our squeaky toys for super chewing, as they are not indestructible; We recommend playing under supervision and replacing the broken ones in a timely manner
